background: The air quality data in Exercise 12.5 (Table 12.9) are associated with the summary statistics reported in Table 12.12.

task.query: Calculate the standard error of the mean difference without assuming equal variance.
Calculate a $95\%$ confidence interval for $\mu_1-\mu_2$, again without assuming equal variance. Use the conservative degrees of freedom to help calculate the confidence interval.

task.answer: $t_{\text{stat}}=\frac{36.25-36.00}{5.247}=0.05$. The one-sided $P$-value (by Table $C$ in the Appendix) is greater 0.25. Therefore, the two-tailed $P>0.50$. Using a software utility (www.cytel.com/Products/StaTable/), $P=0.96$. There is no significant difference in means.
